title: Henbrandt 12 x Squeeze Banana Toy with Water Beads Sticky Gel Sensory Stress Relief Toy for Kids and Adults Soft Squishy Sensory Fidget Ball for Autism, ADHD, Anxiety, Anti-Stress Squeeze Toy
features: Pack of 12 Squeezy Banana toys for children and adults alike.
These squeezy bananas are designed to create a satisfying tactile experience, and they are ideal for people with anxiety or sensory fidget toys for those with autism and ADHD.
The squishy, squeezy banana toys are filled with gel water beads and have a satisfyingly sticky texture.
description: Product description These squeezy bananas are ideal sensory toys for children and adults alike. The fruit squeeze toys are filled with gel water beads and have a satisfyingly sticky texture. The bright yellow bananas are great stress toys and can help with anxiety and stress relief, or as something to fidget with to help with focus. They can be helpful for people with ADHD and Autism, or as an exercise for sufferers of arthritis. The squeezy bananas also make funny party favours, loot bag fillers, stocking fillers, classroom prizes, or pocket money toys. The squeezy banana toys are approximately 14cm / 5.5inches in length and are designed to create a satisfying sensory experience. Display box of 12 squishy crystal bananas per order. Not suitable for pets or children under the age of 3. This product carries the UKCA mark and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning Choking hazard. Staining Risk Adult supervision is recommended.
